creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 177554
Update to 0.0.6

- Update textproc/uchardet to 0.0.6
- Update COMMENT so not to imply that this comes as-is from Mozilla, it is a derivative work
- Update LICENSE; this can be distributed under multiple licenses
- Update pkg-descr and WWW
